description: Hourly ingestd batch throughput, latency, and deferred/failed counts from ingestd_batch_stats_1h.

targets.rawSql: SELECT bucket AS time, total_batches AS value FROM sinex_telemetry.ingestd_batch_stats_1h WHERE bucket > now() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY bucket
SELECT bucket AS time, p99_latency_ms AS value FROM sinex_telemetry.ingestd_batch_stats_1h WHERE bucket > now() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY bucket
SELECT bucket AS time, total_deferred AS "deferred", total_failed AS "failed" FROM sinex_telemetry.ingestd_batch_stats_1h WHERE bucket > now() - INTERVAL '7 days' ORDER BY bucket

title: Sinex Ingestd Batch Stats (1h)
